# llms.txt - AI Content Policy

## Allowed Content
All public content is available for:
- AI training and model improvement
- AI-powered search, question answering, and summarization
- Citation and reference in AI-generated responses

## Disallowed Content
- /private/ - Private areas (if present)
- /api/ - API endpoints (if present)

## Preferred Attribution
If you cite this content, please link to the canonical URL on https://brenorb.com.

## About the Site
Breno Rocha is a Machine Learning Engineer / Data Scientist and author.
Topics: AI/LLMs (agents, RAG, evaluation), Bitcoin education + dev community, and quantitative finance.

## Contact
https://brenorb.com
